title: Colly SMP [NO LONGER UPDATING]
description: The Official Datapack used in the Colly SMP, no changes, no tweaks, THE REAL DEAL!
body:
**[NOTE: THE COLLY SMP HASN'T STARTED YET!! APPLICATIONS HAVEN'T EVEN OPENED YET]**

This datapack features every version of the Colly SMP Datapack available.
It will get updated to the newest version of the Season One Datapack once I have the version done and has Absolutely **NO CHANGES** from the real deal that can be seen in the videos!

A small server with a small community of creators! :)
Hope somebody out there will enjoy this, feel like a member or... if you are a member.. then I guess you can use it to test :)

### **Why Should You Get This❓**

**I am not trying to pressure people into getting my Datapack**, I just want to let other people experience the same experience of my Server whether they are part of it or not.

I am not here to make Money and don't care about getting monitized, I don't need donations I just added it there because I don't mind some extra money, my Patreon pricing isn't good though, so I wouldn't recommend donating until I have atleast a better system.

I hope I can let people enjoy these features, whether it's because of the Burgers, Atomic Cores, Weapons, whatever they like.

If you'd like to have only a certain Feature; e.g Burgers, Coffee etc.
Contact me on the Discord I put in Contacting about any Bugs / Suggestions.
From there I can strip all the features you'd like to remove and keep it as a barebone datapack of whatever you wanted from this pack.

**Remember to be cauticous about downloading content online, as it could be a virus.**
Luckily Modrinth seems to have very polite and good moderators, who seem to deal with possible issues very good!

**Don't feel Pressured and please read the Consequences of Downloading / Potential Risk before you consider adding this to your Server or World!**

I wish you a great day and hopefully a fun experience in-game :)
Have Fun.

### **Contacting about any Bugs / Suggestions🔧**

The Following Link will lead you to a Discord Server, if you don't want to join, that's alright, try contacting me by leaving a comment on the wiki, as its a Patreon Post and you can comment on those :)

You can contact me in The Colly SMP Public Discord at SMP\DatapackSupport: [Support Here!](https://discord.com/channels/1273569573785960468/1273571385587011584)

### **Consequences of Download / Potential Risk⚠️**

The Datapack is used for a Server that BANS The Mace, so any mace obtained in the versions past 0.1 will get replaced by 12 Atomic Cores.

Some Features are Destructive of the Environment, such as; Herobrine Curse and Future Atomic Items.

It is also important to note that **any Server / World using Datapacks that use the Structure_Void or Structure_Block / Any Operator Items, may not work** / might try to fight, because this Datapack uses some Operator Items for Custom Crafts.

Starting from v.0.2 Nuclear Bombs were added too, which unsurpisingly explode a ton of terrain.

I would recommend that you **don't use this on existing Servers without trying it on a Backup of the Server / World First** to see if there are any potential risks.

**Don't download this pack from anywhere, but here or if I send you a customized version over discord!**

It will most likely be somebody trying to pirate this datapack and could be harmful to maybe even your PC!!

### **What It Adds🧪**

This Datapack adds custom items, mobs, functions, advancements as of v0.1
These stuff include:
- **Titan Core** (A Weapon Given To Players who defeat the Atomic Lizard Boss, which is still WIP)
- **Titan Axe** (An Axe Crafted Using The Atomic Cores and Breezerods, that does +9AP)
- **Boosters** (An Item to Levitate the player for a split second, giving them a slight jump boost or when spammed can make them fly)
- **Atomic Core** (The Core Element of the Datapack that is given to the player by doing missions; getting a mace, working on more)
- **Burgers** (A Food Item, that fills all Hunger bars, but takes longer to eat, is craftable)
- **WIP Coffee** (Only have the Custom Model Data, as of v0.1)
- **Ancient Egg** (WIP) (The Atomic Lizard Boss Spawn Egg)
- **Summoning Torches** (Torches Consumed to start a Herobrine Curse upon the player who consumed it)
- **Coins** (Economic Item, no further uses)

### **More Information about the Server🧐**

More Information is availabe on the little Wiki I made on my Patreon (FREE)
[Click This For Wiki](https://www.patreon.com/posts/109906238)

Thank you again to the Modrinth Moderators, I wouldn't have had a nice description if they wouldn't have checked it and told me 😅
